chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1317 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) D/O matter 1. For hearing of CMA No.8043/2025 02-05-2025 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. 1. Notice of this application was issued and served and no objection to the application and/or in respect of the order dated 28.04.2025 is discernable despite petitioner’s contention that the order dated 11.04.2025 has been erroneously passed in this petition as it has no nexus with the said matter hereof. Perusal of the record demonstrates that the contention is correct. In view hereof order dated 11.04.2025 is hereby reviewed and recalled and the petition is restored. It is articulated that the petition merely seeks to prevent encashment of security pending appeal before the Hon’ble Customs Appellate Tribunal, Karachi. It is learned counsel’s contention that the fate of the security be subject to the appeal and the security may not be encashed prior to the appeal having been adjudicated. Learned DAG articulates no cavil to the aforesaid. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Customs Appellate Tribunal, Karachi to decide the pending appeal expeditiously, preferably within 60 days from the date hereof. The fate of the amount secured supra shall be subject to the outcome of the appeal pending before the appellate tribunal. This petition is disposed of in terms herein. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
